name: io.github.Rotwang9000/flashbank
title: FlashBank
description: Fixed-fee P2P term loans (no oracles) and flash loans on Ethereum, Base, Arbitrum and Sepolia.

environmentVariables.name: FLASHBANK_MCP_PRIVATE_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Optional EVM private key enabling write tools (create/take/repay offers, faucet). Omit for read-only mode. Use a throwaway key.

environmentVariables.name: FLASHBANK_MCP_ALLOW_MAINNET
environmentVariables.description: Set to 'true' to allow write tools on mainnets (Ethereum, Base, Arbitrum). Defaults to Sepolia-only writes.

environmentVariables.name: FLASHBANK_MCP_RPC_SEPOLIA
environmentVariables.description: Optional custom RPC URL override for Sepolia (similarly FLASHBANK_MCP_RPC_ETHEREUM / _BASE / _ARBITRUM).
